parameters.text: =Conduct a midcap fund analysis query for scheme: {{ $json.scheme_name }}

parameters.description: Calculates Compounded Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) for 1Y, 3Y, 5Y, and 10Y intervals from a provided array of historical NAV data containing date and nav values.
Calculates risk metrics including annualized standard deviation (volatility), Sharpe Ratio (using risk-free rate of 6.5%), and maximum drawdown statistics from historical NAV data.

parameters.name: prepare_trade
parameters.description: Call this tool to stage a proposed mutual fund reallocation trade. You MUST pass the scheme_name, reallocation_pct (numeric value, e.g. 15 for 15%), and std_dev (standard deviation from the volatility calculator). Returns status 'approved' or 'rejected'.
